title: Stage 11 – Vendor Rating Summary Backend Query (AR-3)

requirements.summary: Add useGetVendorRatingSummary hook and replace frontend rating aggregation in VendorCard, VendorStorePage, and VendorReviewsSection
acceptanceCriteria: A `useGetVendorRatingSummary(vendorId)` hook is exported from `useQueries.ts` and calls the backend `getVendorRatingSummary` function.
`VendorCard.tsx` uses the new hook instead of computing the rating summary from raw reviews.
`VendorStorePage.tsx` and `VendorReviewsSection.tsx` use the new hook for displaying rating summaries where applicable.
The hook handles loading and error states gracefully, showing a loading indicator or fallback UI while fetching.

file_operations.description: Add a new `useGetVendorRatingSummary(vendorId: Principal)` React Query hook that calls `actor.getVendorRatingSummary(vendorId)` and returns the VendorRatingSummary result with loading, error, and data state. Configure the query with a meaningful cache key and enable it only when actor is available and vendorId is provided.

Replace the existing `useGetVendorReviews` hook and frontend aggregation logic with the new `useGetVendorRatingSummary(vendor.principalId)` hook. Update the component to display averageRating, totalReviews, and starBreakdown from the hook's data. Show a loading skeleton while the rating summary is being fetched, and display a fallback state (e.g., 'No ratings yet') when totalReviews is zero or data is unavailable.

Replace any frontend-side rating aggregation with the new `useGetVendorRatingSummary(vendor.principalId)` hook. Update the rating summary display section to use averageRating, totalReviews, and starBreakdown from the hook's data. Handle loading state with a skeleton loader and show a fallback message when no ratings exist.

Integrate the new `useGetVendorRatingSummary(vendorId)` hook to display the rating summary (average rating, total reviews, and per-star breakdown) at the top of the reviews section. Remove any existing frontend aggregation logic that computes these statistics from raw review data. Display the summary with loading and empty states, and ensure it updates when a new review is submitted by invalidating the query.
